texto: Building and supporting these local economies is critical to our bottom line. As repeatedly proven by Building Alliances for Local Living Economies (BALLE), spending at a locally owned business on average keeps 68 out of every 100 dollars circulating within the community. When spending on things from outside our communities, however, only 43 dollars stay local.
explicacao: Citação de Richard W. Jelier Ph.D. sobre temas ligados a vida. “Building and supporting these local economies is critical to our bottom line. As repeatedly prove…” articula vida, culinary, food em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e food.
